description_en: The CRA administers federal tax laws for the Government of Canada. Businesses need a Business Number (BN) to interact with CRA program accounts.
description_fr: L'ARC administre les lois fiscales fédérales. Les entreprises ont besoin d'un numéro d'entreprise (NE) pour interagir avec les comptes de programme de l'ARC.

business_number.description_en: A 9-digit number that is the federal identifier for your business
business_number.how_to_register_en: Register online via Business Registration Online (BRO), by phone at 1-800-959-5525, or in person at a CRA tax services office.

GST_HST.description_en: Required when annual taxable supplies exceed $30,000

payroll.description_en: Required when you hire employees and withhold deductions

my_business_account.description_en: Online portal to manage your CRA accounts, file returns, and make payments
